text:
Sorry about the $FreeBSD$. This was actually a mistake. I have been trying to 
figure out what I did, but I'm not sure. In any case I cannot find anything 
in the diff that suggests use of an older original introduced a problem 
except for that bogus diff.

-- 
/ Peter Schuller
